# TradeNova OS

> TradeNova OS is the Trading Operating System for retail and funded traders — plan trades, journal every execution, analyze performance with AI-powered insights, and refine repeatable playbooks.

TradeNova OS combines a trade journal, playbook lab, replay studio, AI insights, and a learning hub in one workspace. Built for forex, futures, crypto, and equities traders who want to improve consistency through data and structured review.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how TradeNova OS helps traders improve.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for Free, Pro, and Elite tiers with a 7-day free trial.
- [Supported Brokers](/supported-brokers): Broker integrations and CSV import compatibility.
- [Blog](/resources/blog): Trading psychology, journaling tactics, and strategy breakdowns.
- [Help Center](/resources/help-center): Guides for getting started, importing trades, and using AI features.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the TradeNova team.

## Optional

- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at TradeNova.
